overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic coastal city with palm trees and neon-lit modern architecture. The character encounters a physics-glitching vehicle spinning on its side under an elevated highway, then continues running through a covered pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza exit leading to open waterfront promenade

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit plaza with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza, passing neon signs and palm trees

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars dominating the background
glowing cyan neon sign on a building facade
tall palm trees lining the plaza perimeter
large open concrete pedestrian area with geometric patterns
modern reflective glass building with multiple stories
red metal safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a massive elevated highway structure, walking out into a sunlit open plaza lined with palm trees. Neon signs and modern glass buildings frame the scene as pedestrians stroll through the warm, coastal urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway descending to street level

events.description: begins descending concrete ramp from elevated walkway to street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway and descending the ramp toward street level

entered.detail: wide concrete ramp leading down from the elevated walkway
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
multi-lane street at the bottom of the descent

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered elevated walkway beneath the highway structure, passing digital billboards before descending a concrete ramp toward the street level. The palm trees recede to the left as the urban streetscape comes into view.

events.description: encounters a teal and purple vehicle glitching and spinning on its side on the sidewalk
transitions from walking to running while circling the spinning vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching the spinning car cautiously, then running around it to continue down the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal car spinning and flipping on its side due to physics glitch

entered.detail: temporary construction barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: At street level, the character crosses the asphalt and approaches a bizarre scene: a futuristic vehicle spinning and flipping on its side due to a physics glitch. The character transitions to running while circling the malfunctioning car, then continues past it under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the covered walkway, weaving past pedestrians

entered.detail: glowing neon signage on storefronts and buildings
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
commercial shop fronts with glass windows and signage
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance
underside of the concrete highway deck overhead

segments.scene_description: Running under the elevated highway, the character moves through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with support columns and storefronts. The lighting becomes mixed with shadows from the overhead structure, while neon signs and a moderate crowd of pedestrians fill the urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic coastal city, transitioning from a sunlit open plaza into the shadowed corridors of an elevated highway. It begins under a massive concrete structure, moving out into a bright urban square lined with palm trees, neon signs, and glass buildings. As the character moves along a covered elevated walkway, the scene shifts toward a concrete ramp that descends to street level, causing the palm trees to recede as the asphalt urban landscape opens up. The camera then follows the character toward a glitching futuristic vehicle spinning erratically on its side, circling the malfunctioning car before accelerating forward. Finally, the movement carries the character back under the highway into a covered pedestrian walkway, where the bright sunlight gives way to a mix of deep shadows and glowing neon storefronts.
